summary: Document Boundary Service testing completed. All 20 backend tests passed (100%). Verified intelligent multi-page PDF splitting with boundary detection, including: (1) analyze_document_boundaries correctly detects logical document boundaries based on vendor changes, invoice number changes, and letterhead transitions, (2) Same-vendor same-invoice multi-page docs stay together (no false splits), (3) Single-page PDFs return should_split=False, (4) detect_batch_po accepts AP_Invoice, BOL, Unknown types, (5) GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/boundary-analysis returns boundary analysis, (6) POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/auto-split triggers boundary-aware splitting, (7) split_and_ingest_batch accepts groups parameter for boundary-aware splitting.
seed_data_creation: Created synthetic multi-page PDFs using reportlab for testing boundary detection
context_for_next_testing_agent: Document Boundary Service fully tested. Key verifications: (1) document_boundary_service.py correctly extracts page fingerprints (vendor hints, invoice numbers, letterhead detection), (2) Boundary detection uses scoring system: vendor change +3, ref number change +3, letterhead transition +2, doc type change +2, threshold >= 2, (3) batch_po_splitter.py SPLITTABLE_TYPES includes AP_Invoice, BOL, Unknown, (4) detect_batch_po returns groups and boundaries from boundary analysis, (5) GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/boundary-analysis endpoint works, (6) POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/auto-split endpoint works with boundary-aware splitting, (7) Intake pipeline auto-detects and auto-splits multi-page documents.

document_boundary_service: analyze_document_boundaries detects 3 logical docs from 5-page PDF with 3 vendors - PASS
Same-vendor same-invoice multi-page docs stay together (no false splits) - PASS
fingerprint_page extracts vendor hints from page text - PASS
detect_boundaries identifies vendor changes as boundaries - PASS
detect_boundaries keeps same-vendor same-invoice pages together - PASS
batch_po_splitter: detect_batch_po returns groups and boundaries - PASS
SPLITTABLE_TYPES includes AP_Invoice, BOL, Unknown - PASS
api_endpoints: GET /api/documents/{doc_id}/boundary-analysis returns 404 for missing doc - PASS
POST /api/documents/{doc_id}/auto-split returns 404 for missing doc - PASS
intake_pipeline: Intake pipeline auto-detects multi-page documents - PASS
Intake pipeline sets batch_detected, batch_page_count, batch_groups - PASS

analysis.groups: list of {group_num, pages, page_range, page_count, vendor_hint, doc_type_hints, ref_numbers}
analysis.boundaries: list of page numbers where new docs start

mocked_apis.note: No APIs are mocked. All tests use real document_boundary_service and batch_po_splitter modules.
